name: etherscan-api
description: API to etherscan with a simple interface (Etherscan V2, multichain)

scripts.preversion: npm run lint && npm run changelog
scripts.changelog: rm ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && npx changelog https://github.com/sebs/etherscan-api all > ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && git add ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && git commit ./docs/CHANGELOG.md -m changelog
scripts.build: npm run test && npm run docs

author: Sebastian Schürmann
